summary: Frontend-only verification of headline text change + marquee removal + light regression. All targeted checks PASS: hero headline reads 'Data Analyst' (rendered uppercase via CSS), no element with data-testid='marquee' exists, main-section order is hero → about → experience → work → skills → certifications → contact (About follows Hero directly). Regression: navbar About link smooth-scrolled (scrollY=1080), Experience toggles 0/1/2 all clickable, contact form submits and shows success toast 'Message sent — I'll get back to you soon.' No console errors, no page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: None blocking. Portfolio.jsx cleanly renders Hero then About with no marquee — matches request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Headline is 'Data Analyst' (PROFILE.headline); CSS uppercases it in Hero.jsx. Marquee/Ribbon component removed from Portfolio.jsx. Contact toast text is 'Message sent — I'll get back to you soon.' Two toast nodes may render (sonner + role=status) — this is normal for sonner. Backend /api/contact behavior (email_sent=false) was not re-verified this round but toast success indicates 200 response.
